demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse, who is present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I threw up what looked like wet coffee grounds, and when I stood up from the toilet, I nearly blacked out. (Spouse on the call: he's gone really pale and clammy and he can't stand up.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Started throwing up dark stuff and passing black tarry poo, and now he's so dizzy and weak he nearly fainted trying to stand.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 12 hours ago it began with a bad burning pain in the upper tummy, then in the last 4 hours the black tarry stools and the vomiting started
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 12 hours, getting worse over the last few hours
symptom_narrative.character: burning/gnawing pain high in the tummy; vomited material that looked like wet dark coffee grounds; stools are black, tarry and really foul-smelling
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: feels awful and very weak — nearly passed out standing up, has to stay lying down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high in the middle of the tummy, just below the breastbone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the bleeding and vomiting have been happening in the last few hours and keep coming
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying flat helps the dizziness a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to sit up or stand makes him lightheaded and nearly faint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: generalised weakness, feeling faint, looks pale and sweaty (spouse says grey and clammy)
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no previous episode like this that he mentions
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound right now — too dizzy and weak to sit or stand safely

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: drinks a fair bit of alcohol regularly, heavy for a long time

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: over-the-counter ibuprofen now and then for aches

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: heavy, long-standing alcohol intake by his own account
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home with his spouse, who is present and helping on the call

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he looks very pale, almost grey, and is sweaty and clammy, lying flat and too weak to get up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: carer visual impression over the phone, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: vomited material that looked like wet, dark coffee grounds
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient description of appearance; not confirmed or measured

objective_data_offered.value: black, tarry, foul-smelling stools passed twice in the last few hours; more seen in the bathroom
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/carer description; not confirmed on examination

objective_data_offered.value: nearly blacked out and felt the room spin when standing up from the toilet
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported symptom on standing; no home blood-pressure device available to quantify it
